zh.Swettenham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾斯維頓哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable於大約1313年出生在英國英格蘭爾達文波特時，他的父親Sir John Davenport34歲，母親Margery Brereton27歲。他於大約1375年與Joyce de Mainwaring在英國英格蘭爾斯維頓哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1383年1月11日在英國爾達文波特享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾。

zh-hans.Swettenham, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾斯維頓哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable于大约1313年出生在英国英格兰爾達文波特时，他的父亲Sir John Davenport34岁，母亲Margery Brereton27岁。他于大约1375年与Joyce de Mainwaring在英国英格兰爾斯維頓哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1383年1月11日在英国爾達文波特享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable was born about 1313, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Davenport, was 34 and his mother, Margery Brereton, was 27. He married Joyce de Mainwaring about 1375, in Swettenham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 11 January 1383, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable est né environ 1313, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Davenport, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margery Brereton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joyce de Mainwaring environ 1375, à Swettenham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1383, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable um 1313 in Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Davenport 34 und seine Mutter Margery Brereton 27. Er hat um 1375 in Swettenham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Joyce de Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Januar 1383 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Davenport, Cheshire, England und wurde in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable è nato il circa 1313 nel Davenport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Davenport, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margery Brereton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joyce de Mainwaring circa 1375, nel Swettenham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 gennaio 1383, nel Davenport, Cheshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Astbury, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアアストブリー

ja.Ashbury Church, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constableが約1313年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで生まれた時，父Sir John Davenportは34歳，母Margery Breretonは27歳であった。約1375年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアスウエッテンハムでJoyce de Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1383年1月11日にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable(이)가 대략 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 대븐포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Davenport(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Brereton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스w텐함에서 Joyce de Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1383년 1월 11일 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Swettenham, Cheshire, England: Swettenham, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable nasceu aproximadamente 1313, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Davenport, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margery Brereton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joyce de Mainwaring aproximadamente 1375, em Swettenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1383, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable родился около 1313 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Davenport было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Brereton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joyce de Mainwaring около 1375 г. в местности светтенам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 11 января 1383 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable nació aproximadamente 1313, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Davenport, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margery Brereton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joyce de Mainwaring aproximadamente 1375, en Swettenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de enero de 1383, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
